titles.title: I Can Run Through a Troop

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can run through a troop And leap over a wall Hallelujah, hallelujah!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He's my strength and my shield He gives power to all Hallelujah, hallelujah!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am free from condemnation Jesus is the Rock of my salvation.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I can run through a troop And leap over a wall Hallelujah, hallelujah!
